scope: ACL 2027 supplement page 13 grounding-derivation companion v4 render-density iteration

motivation.target_page_before: Round 11 density audit still ranked page 13 as the lowest non-reference page after the proxy-metric v3 pass.
motivation.goal_alignment: Add more registered render material to the derivation spread while preserving the AI-slot exposition boundary and avoiding page-flow regressions on pages 14-15.

measurement.layout_guard_active_definition: RGB pixels where max(channel)-min(channel) > 15 or mean(channel) < 238, matching tests/test_paper_layout.py figure-density checks
measurement.page_active245_definition: RGB pixels where max(channel)-min(channel) > 15 or mean(channel) < 245, used for sparse-page raster review
measurement.red_pixel_fraction_definition: RGB pixels where R > 150, G < 90, and B < 90

claim_boundary.paper_use: visual reading guide for the point-in-box and normalized-1000 coordinate derivations
claim_boundary.notes: The v3 AI-generated metric-contract gate is not a metric, model prediction, benchmark row, VLM output, or new experimental result. Evidence-bearing panels remain registered original/noMDL GRScenes target-view renders and deterministic protocol overlays.

metric_contract_gate_v3.role: AI-generated metric-contract schematic only; deterministic figure code draws critical labels, boundary text, and all evidence-source annotations.

final_figure.local_visual_evidence: The standalone v4 figure adds a third target close-up scorer wall with six registered target crops while retaining the existing formula-to-render and coordinate-conversion render walls. The AI schematic is isolated in the deterministic metric-gate card and the boundary text remains visible.

pdf_review.local_visual_evidence: Rendered page 13 is denser and still coherent: no clipping, no caption collision, and the close-up scorer wall remains visible at PDF scale. Pages 14 and 15 remain readable and did not regress structurally.

tests.result: RED first for missing target close-up scorer wall and v3 slot registration; GREEN after implementation: 2 passed, 72 deselected.
completed; pages 13-15 regenerated for local visual and density review.

review_mode.reason: Local pure visual review was used; no separate clean-room subagent was dispatched because independent delegation was not requested.

residual_risk: This pass improves the page 13-15 derivation cluster but does not complete the broader supplement-wide aesthetic objective; the density audit should be refreshed to select the next low-density non-reference target.
